title: Present tense: regular -er and -ir verbs
objectives: Conjugate regular -er and -ir verbs in the present
Notice where -er and -ir endings differ (only nosotros / vosotros)
grammar_notes: -er pattern (comer): como, comes, come, comemos, coméis, comen.
-ir pattern (vivir): vivo, vives, vive, vivimos, vivís, viven.
-er and -ir share endings EXCEPT for nosotros (-emos vs -imos) and vosotros (-éis vs -ís).
yo and él/ella forms are identical to -ar (-o and -e) — easy memory hook.
example_phrases: Como pasta los lunes. (I eat pasta on Mondays.)
Vivimos en Madrid. (We live in Madrid.)
